name: Chicken Cheese Buns<mom's>
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the chicken, Miracle Whip, Cheez Whiz, onion, and green pepper well.
2. Spread the mixture evenly between 12 small buns.
3. Wrap the assembled buns in foil.
4. Heat in an oven for 20 minutes at 325°F.
5. Alternatively, you can use leftover chicken.
6. You can also spread the mixture on bun halves (like hamburger buns) and bake as above on a cookie sheet.
